# Explanation

The user asked what the project is for. Based on the existing documentation (README.md and AGENTS.md), this repository is a Python Textual TUI client that manages/spawns a local Brokk Java executor, authenticates to it, submits jobs, and streams events/tokens to update the UI. To make this purpose immediately obvious in-repo, add a concise purpose/overview section to the README (and/or align AGENTS.md wording) so new users understand the intent without reading the whole file.

# Brokk Code

Brokk Code is a Textual-based terminal UI client that manages a local
Brokk Java executor, supporting both auto-downloading/caching of official releases and user-supplied JARs.
It communicates with the executor over an authenticated HTTP API to submit jobs, stream real-time events and tokens, and provides

an interactive interface with dedicated chat, context, and task panels.

## Getting Started
=======
# Brokk Code

##

What this project is for

Brokk Code is a Python-based Terminal User Interface (TUI) client built with Text
ual for the Brokk ecosystem. It is designed to launch and manage a local Java executor subprocess, handling authentication over a secure HTTP API
. The application allows users to submit jobs, stream real-time events and tokens, and interact with the executor through a rich terminal

interface featuring dedicated chat, context, and task panels.
